definitions.name: Civic Letterhouse
definitions.summary: Engineers and scribes design letters capable of surviving water, law, and public use.

features.name: unapproved alphabet wall
features.description: One letter repeatedly escapes its chalk box to modify nearby notices.

features.name: canal-pressure writing desk
features.description: Water beneath the tabletop powers a pen that never lifts.

features.name: drowned portfolio rack
features.description: Pages drip upward toward the ceiling and remain perfectly legible.
